responsibilities: • audit accounts of central and state governments   • review public expenditure, re venue, and receipts   • conduct performance and compliance audits   • report audit findings to parliament and legislatures   • support constitutional audit functions   • ensure public financial accountability
qualifications: • ca qualification (through relevant com petitive exams and services)   • strong understanding of public finance and governance   • high ethical standards and independence
